sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The click on (33, 15) worked! The green block at (33, 15) has been converted to black (or removed). Looking at the image, there's now a black gap where the green block was. This confirms that the purple region is active enough to click green blocks in this transformed state.
Now I need to click all remaining green blocks. The remaining green blocks are:
- (3, 33) and (9, 33) - top 2 blocks
- (33, 39), (33, 45), (33, 51) - middle row (3 blocks)
- (39, 15), (39, 21), (39, 27), (39, 33) - lower middle row (4 blocks)
- (45, 15), (45, 21), (45, 27), (45, 33) - bottom row (4 blocks)
Total: 13 remaining green blocks
Let me click all of them now while the purple region is active.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click worked! Click all remaining 13 green blocks
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 3, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 9, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 45},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 51},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 15},

    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 27},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 33}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
